privileged_info_summary: The task creates a Docker image 'legacy-app:unsafe' containing a critical secret 'AKIA_TEST_SECRET_DO_NOT_USE' in its layer history. The image has metadata: ENV variable APP_COLOR=blue and exposed port 5000/tcp. The agent must create 'legacy-app:safe' without the secret while preserving all metadata and application functionality.
